body.summary: URGENT: Review LOCK 016 spec for Tripp.Control Runtime Adapter Boundary Specification.
body.context: This defines the contract for how future runtime layers plug into governance spine. Metadata-only, no implementation.
body.spec_extract: LOCK 016 creates defineRuntimeBoundary(input) that returns boundary metadata: status, boundary_id, boundary_type, readiness_level, runtime_allowed_now (false), provider_allowed_now (false), dispatch_allowed_now (false), persistence_allowed_now (false), allowed_inputs, required_preconditions, forbidden_actions, blocked_until_future_locks, adapter_contract, safety_flags (all false).
body.your_job: Review quickly. Is it well-scoped? Does it correctly block runtime while defining the contract? Return structured feedback.
body.output_format: JSON response with review_items array. Each item: {severity, category, description, suggestion}
